text.message: Why am I a double solo...
Red... What am I missing lad?
Blue was 1 ore from a 634 city...
Every solo is a solo back just fyi
Black and oj doing well too
Why wouldn’t you block two people at once?
Sorry black but this is how it is for solos
so am i not allowed to block anyone?
just take the deal and you wont have to worry about it
Can't invent resources I don't have...
why embargo just to undo it
You ask I accept, you get greedy you get punished...
ok then keep the embargo on
It's a single turn embargo. If I was way in lead can get greedy. But when I'm being fair make trades
Or I lock out that tutn
Red I think you have to block blue...
